arts.ttl: Roma’s Ghisolfi: “Ranieri asked to honour the Jersey, there’s positive energy at Trigoria”
arts.sum: Florent Ghisolfi, the sporting director of AS Roma, spoke to Sky in the lead-up to the match against Napoli, which marks Claudio Ranieri’s first game in charge since returning to the club. Ghisolfi shared insights on the team’s current atmosphere and their strategic approach to the upcoming challenge. Ghisolfi emphasized the importance of maintaining a positive mindset within the squad. “We need to keep a positive energy. Ranieri has asked us to defend this jersey with our heads held high. For some weeks now, we have been seeing a positive energy at Trigoria,” he stated. arts.ttl: Serie A | Napoli v Roma: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Roma face injury concerns ahead of their crucial match with Napoli, with star forward Paulo Dybala likely limited to a substitute role due to ongoing muscular issues. New manager Claudio Ranieri is taking a cautious approach with the Argentine playmaker, whose absence significantly impacts the team’s performance, reducing their win rate by 13%. Despite these setbacks, Roma’s top scorer Artem Dovbyk is expected to start, though he’s carrying a minor knee problem. The team’s attacking options are further limited with Eldor Shomurodov sidelined, while Spanish defender Mario Hermoso is also unavailable due to injury.
